◎简　　介  

　　Journey to the most diverse peninsula in the world. Indochina boasts breath-taking landscapes, historic cities, tropical jungles and animals galore. Its rich biodiversity is spread through a wide variety of habitats from island Malaysia, to southwest China and Vietnam to Cambodia and Thailand.
